headline: Grantham: Most Expensive Market in US History
detail: Jeremy Grantham's warning signals elevated crash risk for richly valued growth and tech stocks. Your book is 90% concentrated in exactly the names that get hit hardest in a valuation reset. On margin, that's not abstract risk.

headline: Micron Sinks After Whipsaw Week
detail: Micron weakness drags chip sentiment broadly, which directly pressures AVGO and your SMH position. AVGO is already your largest losing position on a SELL signal — deteriorating chip tape makes a bounce harder to count on.

headline: Inflation Above 4%, Trump Eases Fed Pressure
detail: Inflation staying elevated keeps rate cuts off the table longer, which compresses valuations on high-multiple tech names like PLTR and CRWD. Higher-for-longer rates also increase your margin carrying costs directly.

headline: SpaceX Stock Could See More Volatility
detail: You hold both SPCX (new IPO) and SPAL (2x leveraged SpaceX ETF) — more volatility ahead means both positions could whip hard in either direction. SPAL's daily decay makes prolonged chop especially damaging; these need tight manual management.
